G'PACE

MENU

G’PACE Unit

G’PACE is a prerequisite for entry into the graduate English-instructed programs at Istanbul Okan University.

G’PACE aims to provide its students with the academic skills of listening, reading, writing and speaking; which will assist them in their future academic studies.

G’PACE Courses

In G’PACE, our students are geared with academic skills provided by their lecturers and the content. Students are driven to reach a CEFR B2 exit level through a variety of departmental related topics so that they can use the language taught in all four areas with enthusiasm. Our assessment and evaluation system is also prepared in coordination with our education system both in-class and online.
